Customer has `yearsWithMHPCO`. Steps have `op: "quote"` and `items`.

The existing claim-office.ts has `export function quote({ items, years, priorContract }: ...)`. Note `years` not `yearsWithMHPCO`. Map customer.yearsWithMHPCO → years. For this test, only `quote` op needs handling (priorContract can default to false for first quote step).

Write minimal code. Run `pnpm test` to confirm 41 passing, 8 todo, 0 failing.

content.text:
All 41 tests pass with 8 todo, 0 failing.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Minimal CLI at /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_03-35-32_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/cli.ts that reads JSON from stdin, maps each step through the existing `quote` function (mapping `customer.yearsWithMHPCO` to `years`, defaulting `priorContract` to false), and writes `{"results": [...]}` to stdout.

- Approach: Just enough to satisfy the current test - no claim handling, no error handling, no priorContract logic across steps. Those will be driven by future tests in the todo list.
